title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: IBM presents an approach using context engineering and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to align AI agents with design systems, enabling agents to build consistent and correct applications. The video discusses how design system constraints can be integrated into agentic workflows through contextual guidance.
writeup: This IBM Technology video covers an approach for aligning AI agents with design systems using context engineering and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). It addresses a gap in agentic coding: agents that build applications without respecting design system constraints produce inconsistent or incorrect output. The takeaway is that design system rules can be supplied to agents as contextual guidance through MCP, integrating those constraints directly into agentic workflows so agents generate consistent and correct applications.
